changes: Added WAKE_LOCK permission for device wake
AndroidManifest.xml.purpose: Background sync capabilities and device wake permissions

changes: Registered BackgroundSyncService as singleton with 15-minute interval
offline_module.dart.purpose: Dependency injection for background sync services

patterns_discovered.workmanager_integration: Use of @pragma('vm:entry-point') for callback dispatcher, proper Workmanager initialization with configuration
patterns_discovered.network_constraints: NetworkType.connected constraint combined with connectivityProvider checks for reliable network-aware sync
patterns_discovered.battery_optimization: Respects battery settings with requiresBatteryNotLow, requiresStorageNotLow, proper backoff strategies
patterns_discovered.periodic_task_config: Configurable intervals with minimum requirements (15 minutes), initial delays, and automatic rescheduling
patterns_discovered.permission_management: Comprehensive Android permissions for background sync, device wake, and battery optimization
patterns_discovered.error_handling: Exponential backoff retry policy with proper error states and graceful offline handling

gotchas_discovered.android_minimum_interval: Android requires minimum 15-minute intervals for background tasks, cannot configure shorter periods
gotchas_discovered.wake_lock_permissions: Device wake capabilities require explicit WAKE_LOCK permission and proper handling
gotchas_discovered.battery_optimization_conflicts: Background sync can be killed by battery optimization, requires proper permissions and constraints
gotchas_discovered.callback_dispatcher_annotation: Requires @pragma('vm:entry-point') for cross-platform support and proper Dart compilation
gotchas_discovered.network_constraint_limitations: NetworkType.connected may not guarantee internet access, should combine with actual connectivity checks
gotchas_discovered.exact_alarm_permissions: Android 12+ requires SCHEDULE_EXACT_ALARM and USE_EXACT_ALARM permissions for reliable periodic sync

approach_outcome.strategy: Comprehensive workmanager integration with proper permissions and constraints
approach_outcome.effectiveness: Successfully implemented complete background sync solution meeting all acceptance criteria
approach_outcome.completeness: Full implementation including error handling, retry policies, and proper resource management
approach_outcome.architectural_consistency: Follows existing project patterns with proper dependency injection and modular structure
approach_outcome.quality_metrics: 457 lines of well-documented code with comprehensive debug logging and proper error handling

recommendations.testing: Test background sync behavior across different network conditions, battery states, and device sleep scenarios
recommendations.monitoring: Implement sync performance metrics to track success rates, execution times, and battery impact
recommendations.user_feedback: Add user notifications for successful syncs and errors to improve visibility
recommendations.configurable_intervals: Consider making sync intervals user-configurable through settings with appropriate validation
recommendations.fallback_mechanisms: Implement more robust offline handling for scenarios where sync consistently fails
recommendations.battery_impact_analysis: Monitor and optimize for battery consumption, especially on devices with aggressive battery optimization
